utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Check full specification: Destination is clearly stated. Travel_dates include specific dates. Transportation includes flight details with a booking code and total/per-person costs. Accommodation includes hotel name, address, booking code, nights, and total/nightly costs. Activities list items with individual costs and a total. Additional_services list restaurant reservations with costs and a total. Total_budget provides a complete breakdown summing categories. All items are fully specified with required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map each item from the final package to the closest matching entry in the ground-truth ratings. Destination: 'Prague, Czech Republic' directly matches 'Prague, Czech Republic'. Transportation: 'Budget Airlines flights' corresponds to transportation > budget_airlines > Economy Class. Accommodation: 'Boutique Stay Hotel' corresponds to accommodation > Boutique Stay. Activities listed map to: Golf Day Premium -> Golf Day, City Walking Tour -> City Walking Tour, Museum Day Pass -> Museum Day Pass, Prague Castle Tour is not in the ground truth and thus cannot be rated. Additional services (restaurants): Italian Trattoria -> Italian Trattoria, Fine Dining Experience -> Fine Dining Experience (restaurants), French Café -> French Café.
